title: Chapter 38
text: Also By Shain Rose Meet the Billionaire Stonewood Brothers INEVITABLE-Order now A second chance romance that spans childhood to adulthood. When Jax saves Aubrey from a fire her father started, will they be able to overcome the trauma and focus on their love for one another? REVERIE - Order now An angsty, enemies-to-lovers standalone romance where opposites definitely attract. When Jett acquires Vick’s company, everyone is wondering if they have what it takes to survive the tension in the office. THRIVE-Order now A captivating friends-to-lovers small town romance where Mikka and Jay will have to face their dark pasts while indulging in small town delights. New Reign Mafia Romance Duet 1. Heart of a Monster-Order Now 2. Love of a Queen-Order Now A gripping mafia romance with angst, turmoil, steam and love. Rome and Katie will have to fight the mob and the city to find a way to be together. Will they make it out alive?
